narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 5-B (precinct in Scioto County) has 391 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
